description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single job named py36_tests running in the default test stage, using the python:3.6 Docker image. The job should execute the exact shell commands: apt-get update -q -y, pip install -r requirements.txt, pip install coverage, ./manage.py makemigrations --check, coverage run --branch manage.py test, and coverage report --omit=.virt/* --fail-under=97. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are required, and the pipeline does not deploy anywhere.
